channel.title: bimap on StataViz
channel.description: Recent content in bimap on StataViz

item.title: Bi-variate map
item.description: Created using the bimap package ssc install bimap, replace For more info visit the stata-bimap GitHub page.

item.description: Created using the bimap package ssc install bimap, replace For more info visit the stata-bimap GitHub page.

item.title: Bi-variate map
item.description: Created using the bimap and spmap packages Install the packages: ssc install bimap, replace ssc install spmap, replace For more info visit the stata-bimap GitHub page.
